ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "move" TEXT /* Movement capability of the unit */,
  "wounds" INTEGER /* Wounds that the unit can take */,
  "bravery" INTEGER /* Bravery level of the unit */,
  "save" TEXT /* Saving throw of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit */,
  "unit_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the unit */,
  "unit_size" TEXT /* Size of the unit */,
  "unit_range" TEXT /* Attack range of the unit */,
  "unit_damage" INTEGER /* Damage the unit can inflict */,
  "unit_special_rules" TEXT /* Special rules or abilities of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factions" (
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faction */,
  "faction_name" TEXT /* Name of the faction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the faction represents */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the faction was established */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the faction leader */,
  "alliance_id" INTEGER /* ID of any alliances the faction is part of */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the faction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the faction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_faction_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was assigned to the faction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_faction_relationships_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_faction_relationships_faction_id FOREIGN KEY ("faction_id") REFERENCES factions ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the attribute does */,
  "attribute_cost" INTEGER /* Cost associated with the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (e.g., defensive, offensive) */,
  "attribute_range" TEXT /* Range of effect for the attribute */,
  "attribute_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the attribute's effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_attributes" (
  "unit_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the unit's attribute association */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the attribute was added to the unit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the attribute assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_attributes_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_attributes_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date when the game session took place */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning unit */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_units" (
  "session_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session-unit relationship */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "unit_role" TEXT /* Role the unit played in the session (e.g., attacker, defender) */,
  "unit_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the unit in the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-unit relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the session-unit relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_units_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_units_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., strategy, role-playing) */,
  "game_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the game was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_game_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was added to the game */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_game_relationships_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_game_relationships_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, player) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the preference */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for which the report is created */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text content of the battle report */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the report */,
  "report_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
